  • Uses of Card in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card

    Subclasses of Card in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ArtistCard
    Represents an Artist tribe member card.
    class 
    BuilderCard
    Represents a Builder tribe member card.
    class 
    BuildingCard
    Represents a building card in Mesos.
    class 
    EventCard
    Represents an event card in the Mesos deck.
    class 
    GathererCard
    Represents a Gatherer tribe card.
    class 
    HuntersCard
    Represents a Hunter tribe card.
    class 
    InventorCard
    Represents an Inventor tribe card.
    class 
    ShamanCard
    Represents a Shaman tribe card.

  • Uses of Card in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Factory.Deck

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Factory.Deck that return types with arguments of type Card
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Card>
    DeckFactory.createDeck(int playerNumber)
    Builds the card deck for the given player count by loading the correct JSON resource and merging in the era event cards.
    List<Card>
    DeckFactory.loadDeck(List<CardDTO> cards)
    Rebuilds a list of Cards from their DTO snapshots during game restore.

  • Uses of Card in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game that return types with arguments of type Card
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Card>
    Market.getBottomCardList()
    Returns the list of cards (villagers and events) in the bottom (previous-round) row.
    List<Card>
    Market.getTopCardList()
    Returns the list of cards (villagers and events) in the top (current-round) row.

  • Uses of Card in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Observers

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Observers with parameters of type Card
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    PlayerObserver.notifyCardAddedToTribe(String playername, Card cardAdded)
    Called when a card is added to the player's tribe.
    Method parameters in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Observers with type arguments of type Card
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    MarketObserver.onExtraDrawSnapshotReady(List<Card> snapshotCards, List<BuildingCard> snapshotBuildings)
    Called just before the end-of-round market refresh, carrying the exact cards that were available at the close of the round.
    void
    MarketObserver.onMarketChanged(List<Card> topCards, List<Card> bottomCards, List<BuildingCard> topBuildings, List<BuildingCard> bottomBuildings)
    Called once at game start to push the full initial market state to the observer.
    void
    PlayerObserver.onPlayerChanged(String nickname, Totem totem, int food, int prestigePoint, List<Card> tribe, List<BuildingCard> buildingCards)
    Called once at game start to push the full initial player state to the observer.
    void
    MarketObserver.onTopCardRefreshed(List<Card> topCards)
    Called when the top card row is refreshed (old top becomes new bottom, new top is dealt).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Player.getTribe()
    Returns all cards in the player's tribe.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Player.addCardToTribe(Card card)
    Adds a non-building card to the player's tribe.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    UtilitiesFunction.countOccurrence(List<Card> listToParse, List<Integer> setCards)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerVirtualView.notifyCardAddedToTribe(String playername, Card cardAdded)
    Adds the card to the player's tribe snapshot and notifies the client.
    Method parameters in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer with type arguments of type Card
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerVirtualView.onExtraDrawSnapshotReady(List<Card> snapshotCards, List<BuildingCard> snapshotBuildings)
    Saves the end-of-turn market snapshot used for the extra draw.
    void
    ServerVirtualView.onMarketChanged(List<Card> topCards, List<Card> bottomCards, List<BuildingCard> topBuildings, List<BuildingCard> bottomBuildings)
    Updates the market snapshot and sends the full new configuration (top and bottom rows of cards and buildings) to the client.
    void
    ServerVirtualView.onPlayerChanged(String nickname, Totem totem, int food, int prestigePoint, List<Card> tribe, List<BuildingCard> buildingCards)
    Deprecated.
    void
    ServerVirtualView.onTopCardRefreshed(List<Card> topCards)
    Moves the top market row to the bottom, updates the top row with the new cards, and notifies the client.
